translations.ko: 너 아직 내 표 가지고 있어.
translations.ru: У тебя всё ещё мой билет.
translations.pt: Você ainda tem o meu bilhete.
translations.he: יש לך עדיין את הכרטיס שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn vẫn giữ vé của tôi.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे पास अभी भी मेरा टिकट है।
translations.ja: まだ僕の切符を持ってる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; informal register; functions as the subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses possession; agrees with 'Tu'.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates that the possession continues at the present time.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular form; agrees with 'ticket'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'as'.

sentences.target: Je garde le ticket de caisse pour toi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə gaʁd lə tikɛ də kɛs puʁ twa/

translations.fr: Je garde le ticket de caisse pour toi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə gaʁd lə tikɛ də kɛs puʁ twa/
translations.en: I'm keeping the receipt for you.
translations.de: Ich bewahre den Kassenbon für dich auf.
translations.pt: Eu vou guardar o recibo para você.
translations.vi: Tôi giữ hóa đơn cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik bewaar de bon voor jou.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारे लिए रसीद रख रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg tar vare på kvitteringen for deg.
translations.ja: 君のためにレシートを取っておく。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; functions as the subject of 'garde'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking 'le ticket' as its object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determinates 'ticket'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'garde'.
Preposition linking 'ticket' to 'caisse' to form the compound 'ticket de caisse' (receipt).
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'de' in the compound noun phrase.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary complement.
Stressed (disjunctive) pronoun, 2nd person singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On doit valider notre ticket avant d'entrer.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa valide nɔtʁ tikɛ avɑ̃ dɑ̃tʁe/

translations.fr: On doit valider notre ticket avant d'entrer.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa valide nɔtʁ tikɛ avɑ̃ dɑ̃tʁe/
translations.en: We have to validate our ticket before entering.
translations.es: Tenemos que validar nuestro billete antes de entrar.
translations.de: Wir müssen unser Ticket vor dem Eintritt validieren.
translations.it: Dobbiamo convalidare il nostro biglietto prima di entrare.
translations.ko: 들어가기 전에 우리 표를 찍어야 해.
translations.ru: Перед входом мы должны отсканировать наш билет.
translations.pt: Temos que validar nosso bilhete antes de entrar.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לאמת את הכרטיס שלנו לפני הכניסה.
translations.tr: İçeri girmeden önce biletimizi doğrulamamız gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải quét vé trước khi vào.
translations.ar: يجب أن نفعّل تذكرتنا قبل الدخول.
translations.nl: We moeten ons kaartje valideren voordat we naar binnen gaan.
translations.uk: Перед входом ми маємо підтвердити наш квиток.
translations.hu: Be kell érvényesítenünk a jegyünket, mielőtt bemegyünk.
translations.hi: अंदर जाने से पहले हमें अपने टिकट की पुष्टि करनी होगी।
translations.pl: Musimy zwalidować nasz bilet przed wejściem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να επικυρώσουμε το εισιτήριό μας πριν μπούμε.
translations.nb: Vi må validere billetten vår før vi går inn.
translations.id: Kita harus memvalidasi tiket kita sebelum masuk.
translations.sv: Vi måste validera vår biljett innan vi går in.
translations.ro: Trebuie să validăm biletul înainte de a intra.
translations.cs: Před vstupem musíme validovat náš lístek.
translations.da: Vi skal validere vores billet, før vi går ind.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää leimata lippumme ennen sisäänmenoa.
translations.ja: 入る前にチケットを認証しないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/collective subject pronoun; commonly used for 'we'; subject of 'doit'.
Modal verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitive complement ('valider').
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'doit'; transitive, with 'notre ticket' as object.
Possessive determiner, 1st person plural; singular form; agrees with 'ticket'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'valider'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Infinitive verb 'entrer' preceded by the preposition 'de' contracted as 'd'' after 'avant'; functions as the complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: Vous avez perdu votre ticket du parking.
sentences.reading: /vu avez pɛʁdy vɔtʁ tikɛ dy paʁkiŋ/

translations.fr: Vous avez perdu votre ticket du parking.
translations.ipa: /vu avez pɛʁdy vɔtʁ tikɛ dy paʁkiŋ/
translations.es: Ha perdido su ticket del aparcamiento.
translations.it: Ha perso il biglietto del parcheggio.
translations.pt: Você perdeu o ticket do estacionamento.
translations.vi: Bạn đã làm mất vé gửi xe.
translations.hi: आपने अपनी पार्किंग टिकट खो दी है।
translations.ja: 駐車券をなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person plural (also formal singular); subject of 'avez'.
Auxiliary verb in present indicative, 2nd person plural; forms the compound past with 'perdu'.
Past participle of 'perdre'; main lexical verb in a compound tense with auxiliary 'avez'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person; singular form; agrees with 'ticket'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'perdu'.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and the definite article 'le'; introduces the noun complement 'parking' specifying the type/source.
Common noun; object of the prepositional article 'du'.
